breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
TECHNICAL CRITERIA:-
Definition of Bidder:-
Agency responsible for quoting for the complete works and owing single point overall
responsibility for execution & completion of the total job.
For services: -
The Bidder should have successfully completed similar works* (as defined below) during the
last 10 years from the original bid due date of tender. The value of the works completed
(proof of completion to be submitted) should be as follows:

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
Sr No Basic value for non Basic value for MSE
MSE (Rs.) (Rs.)
1 One similar work Rs 1020 lakhs Rs 867 lakhs
2 Two similar works Rs 680 lakhs Rs 578 lakhs
3 Three similar works Rs 510 lakhs Rs 434 lakhs
Values mentioned above are basic value only i.e., without any taxes.

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
* Definition of similar service(s):-
The Bidder, as a contractor, must have successfully executed a Fired Heater Revamp Package
job for a heater in hydrocarbon service, completed as part of a new/revamp project or any
maintenance and inspection activity. The scope should have involved fabrication, supply,
installation or replacement of any section coil in a process heater with a minimum quantum
of work of 3000 Inch-Meter or 1000 ID in any upstream and downstream industry involved
in crude production and processing / Petrochemical plants / Chemical process plants /
Hydrocarbon gas processing/ Power plants in India or abroad in the preceding past 10 years
from the original bid due date of tender

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
A job executed and completed by a bidder as a Sub-contractor shall be considered for the
purpose of meeting the experience criteria of BQC subject to submission of following
documents in support of meeting the “Bidder Qualification Criteria”:
i. Copy of work order along with SOR issued by main Contractor.
ii. Copies of Completion Certificate(s) from the main Contractor.
iii. In addition, copies of Completion Certificate(s) from the end User/ Owner/ Project
Management Consultant (PMC) mentioning that the work has been executed by bidder as a
sub-contractor or a copy of approval by end User/Owner for engaging the bidder as Sub-
contractor.
The Completion Certificate(s) shall have details like work order no., date, brief scope of
work, ordered & executed value of the job, completion date etc. as required for qualification
of the bidder in line with BQC.

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
In case of composite contracts, wherein similar work forms a part of the contract, the
executed value of the similar works only shall be considered for evaluation. Break-up of the
executed value to be submitted by the bidder with client certification
All above clauses shall be read in conjunction

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text:
FINANCIAL CRITERIA:-
a. The bidder’s average annual financial turnover during the last 3 years, ending 31st March
of the previous financial year shall be Rs. 510 Lakhs or higher.
b. The bidder’s net worth should be positive as per the latest audited balance sheet.
c. Bidder should have completed 3 financial years of existence as on the original due date of
the tender since the date of commencement of business.

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID The bidder shall furnish documentary evidence as below: a. Copy of relevant pages of work order(s)/ contract agreement(s)/ contract document(s) mentioning the value and the scope of work for the reference unit(s) submitted for qualification. b. Completion Certificate(s) by end user / Owner / Owner's Consultant/ EPC or Main contractor (who has placed order on Bidder) indicating Name of Work and Work Order/Contract No. & date, completed value of Work, date of Completion etc. submitted for qualification. c. In case executed value is not mentioned in the completion certificate, the copy of certified bill shall also be acceptable for determining value if submitted along with completion certificate. Certified Copies of final invoice and final executed SOR quantities & values to arrive at qualifying values as per Technical Criteria Note to Bidder:- i. JV/Consortium bids shall not be acceptable. ii. In the case of a subsidiary relying on technical experience of Parent Company or vice versa, a parental guarantee shall be submitted along with the bid undertaking the responsibility for successful completion of job. In such cases the bidder shall meet the necessary financial criteria’s of BQC. Also, the bidder shall meet PPPMII criteria without any violation. iii. Job may have been awarded prior to 10 years of tender but it’s completion must fall within 10 year from original bid due date of tender. iv. For the jobs which have been executed abroad, only basic

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text: any violation. iii. Job may have been awarded prior to 10 years of tender but it’s completion must fall within 10 year from original bid due date of tender. iv. For the jobs which have been executed abroad, only basic value shall be considered for evaluation and the rate of conversion to INR shall be conversion rate applicable SBI TT selling rate on the date on which work order have been issued by Owner. v. Documentary proof in the form of Purchase Order / Contract copy and Client’s certification in the form of Completion certificate or payment advice /slip/tax Invoice, for the

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text: value of work done as per BQC. Bidder should ensure uploading / submission of complete information / documents in the first instance itself at specified location in the e-tender. Qualification may be completed based on the details so furnished without seeking any subsequent additional information. BPCL reserves the right to complete the evaluation based on the details furnished without seeking any additional information. After the submission of bid, bidders are not allowed to change the price or substance of the bid. vi. So far as submission of documents is concerned with regard to qualification criteria, after submission of tender, only related short fall documents shall be asked for and considered. However, no new contract shall be considered to qualify the bidder. vii. Bidder must submit audited Balance sheets/Statement of Assets & Liabilities etc., Profit and loss account statement and Income Tax Return (ITR) for last three financial years viz. FYs 2024-25, 2023-24 & 2022-23. Financial Year shall be Year Ending 31st March or as followed by the bidder. Further, for bidders who have not finalized their books of account for the financial year 2024-25, evaluation of these criteria would be done for the latest three financial years ending 2023-24 for which books of account has been finalized and audited. viii. Copies of documents for meeting the bid qualification criteria (BQC), shall be duly verified with originals & attested by any one of the independent third-party inspection agency (TPIA), which are

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > TENDER FOR SERVICE CONTRACT FOR RADIANT TUBE SUPPORT MODIFICATION AND ENHANCEMENT OF HEAT DUTY FOR VDU HEATER AT BPCL MR.
text: which books of account has been finalized and audited. viii. Copies of documents for meeting the bid qualification criteria (BQC), shall be duly verified with originals & attested by any one of the independent third-party inspection agency (TPIA), which are registered under “NABCB accredited bodies as per requirement of ISO/IEC17020/25 as Type A” in QCI’s NABCB website as on the date of attestation. All charges for verification & attestation by TPIA shall be borne by the Bidders.

breadcrumb: DOCUMENTS AND DATA REQUIRED WITH BID > UNDERTAKING BY BIDDER TOWARDS SUBMISSION OF TPIA* VERIFIED DOCUMENTS > Clause 2 In case emerging as successful bidder, I / We shall submit the TPIA* verified copies of required

Ref.: _____ Date: _______
The Procurement Manager,
CPO-Refineries,
Mumbai Refinery,
Mahul, Chembur,
Mumbai – 400074
Dear Sir,
Subject: Verification of Bidder’s Qualification Criteria (BQC) related documents of the
Tender
Ref: CRFQ NO:- 1000______, GeM Bid No.:___________, Tender for “______________”
All the BQC documents and credentials submitted/uploaded as a part of this tender have
been verified with the originals by TPIA.
It is certified that none of the documents are false/forged or fabricated. All the documents
submitted have been made having full knowledge of (i) the provisions of the Indian laws in
respect of offences including but not limited to those pertaining to criminal breach of trust,
cheating and fraud and (ii) provisions of bidding conditions which entitle Bharat Petroleum
Corporation Limited to initiate appropriate action in the event of such declaration turning
out to be a misrepresentation or false representation.
I further certify that additional documents, if any, required to be submitted by us (bidding
agency) shall be submitted under my knowledge and those documents shall also be true,
authentic, genuine, exact copy of its original and shall not be false/forged or fabricated.
We understand that BPCL reserves the right not to consider our offer on account of
noncompliance regarding submission of BQC/techno-commercial related documents duly
verified by the TPIA.
